responsibilities: Design, validate, and optimize manufacturing process flows to improve yield, throughput, and product consistency
Develop and execute process validation protocols including IQ, OQ, and PQ documentation for regulatory compliance
Analyze production data using SPC and Six Sigma methodologies to identify variation sources and drive corrective actions
Lead cross-functional root cause investigations for process deviations and implement permanent corrective measures
Create and maintain process flow diagrams, P&IDs, and standard operating procedures for new and existing processes
Collaborate with quality, R&D, and operations teams to scale up processes from pilot to full production volume
Evaluate and commission new process equipment, ensuring integration meets safety, quality, and throughput targets
Conduct capability studies and design of experiments to optimize critical process parameters and reduce defect rates
